title: Apostrophe and quotes
text: it's a fact. don't worry. she said "hello" and smiled. that's the way it's done.
finger_focus: Right pinky reaches to ' (next to ;), double quote = Shift + '
tips: Apostrophe (') is next to ; — right pinky
Double quote (") = Shift + ' — pinky for both
Contractions don't have spaces: it's, don't, that's

character_tips.anna: Apostrophe makes contractions. Don't pause inside them — it's one fluid press.
character_tips.maxim: Quoted speech needs matching pairs. Open with ", close with ".
character_tips.klavochka: Beautiful contractions, sunshine! Like little linked words! ✨
